domain.name: education
domain.description: Planning and checklists for academic goals such as graduate school applications.

task.name: one_year_grad_application_todo_list
task.title: 1-Year Graduate School Application To-Do List
task.description: Monthly breakdown of tasks and milestones for preparing and submitting graduate school applications over one year.

schema.name: todo_list
schema.description: A year-long todo list organized by month with actionable tasks.

root_fields.title: 1-Year Grad School Application To-Do List
root_fields.overview: Monthly milestones and concrete tasks to prepare, apply, and follow up for graduate school applications over the next 12 months.

fields.name: Clarify goals and programs
fields.description: Decide target fields (CS subareas), degree type (MS/PhD), and 6-10 target programs.
check_items: Rank programs by fit and admission timeline

fields.name: Create application calendar
fields.description: Map deadlines, test dates, and internal milestones over 12 months.
check_items: Set reminders 8 and 4 weeks before each deadline

fields.name: Assess standardized tests
fields.description: Decide if GRE/subject tests are needed and plan prep.

fields.name: Identify coursework gaps
fields.description: Find prerequisite classes or skills to strengthen candidacy.
check_items: Plan to take courses or online modules

fields.name: Engage in research / summer project planning
fields.description: Start or ramp up research/projects to strengthen statement and letters.

fields.name: Document results
fields.description: Keep clear notes, code repo, and a short write-up for each project.
check_items: Prepare short README and results summary

fields.name: Build list of potential advisors
fields.description: Identify 10-20 faculty per program whose work aligns with yours.
check_items: Note specific projects to mention in emails

fields.name: Start polite outreach
fields.description: Email faculty with concise interest and relevant work; request advice.

fields.name: Draft personal statement / SOP
fields.description: Write an initial draft focusing on research experience, fit, and goals.

fields.name: Update academic CV
fields.description: Create a concise CV highlighting research, publications, and relevant coursework.

fields.name: Identify recommenders
fields.description: Choose 3-4 people familiar with your research and academic potential.
check_items: Prefer research supervisors and senior instructors

fields.name: Request recommendations
fields.description: Ask recommenders early, provide deadlines and materials.
check_items: Send CV, statement draft, and key points
Confirm willingness and expected submission date

fields.name: Intensive test prep (if needed)
fields.description: Follow a study plan for GRE/subject tests; take practice exams weekly.

fields.name: Collect unofficial transcripts
fields.description: Download transcripts to include with pre-applications or for recommenders.

fields.name: Revise SOP and CV based on feedback
fields.description: Incorporate advisor and peer feedback; tailor versions for specific programs.

fields.name: Prepare writing/research samples
fields.description: Select/format papers or project reports to submit or share with recommenders.
check_items: Polish one-page summary for each sample

fields.name: Create accounts and pre-fill forms
fields.description: Open application portals, upload documents and ensure recommenders have links.
check_items: Enter basic info in each portal
Upload CV and transcripts where allowed

fields.name: Draft short answers and program-specific statements
fields.description: Prepare concise responses for program prompts and questions.

fields.name: Complete final reviews
fields.description: Proofread, verify recommenders, double-check transcripts and fees.
check_items: Verify PDFs open and are labeled correctly

fields.name: Submit applications
fields.description: Pay fees and submit; save confirmation emails and receipts.

fields.name: Prepare for interviews
fields.description: Practice research talks, common questions, and technical anchors.

fields.name: Send thank-you/follow-up notes
fields.description: Send concise emails to interviewers and faculty contacts.

fields.name: Compare offers and funding
fields.description: Evaluate advisor fit, funding, location, and long-term goals.

fields.name: Plan contingencies
fields.description: If no offers, plan reapplication or gap-year research options.

user_facing.title: 1-Year Grad School Application Plan
user_facing.overview: A month-by-month checklist to organize preparation, applications, and follow-up so you stay on track from early planning to final decisions.

sections.title: Plan and prioritize (Months 1-2)
sections.summary: Clarify your goals, build a timeline, and decide on required tests and prerequisites.
bullets: Choose target programs and advisors
Create a calendar with deadlines and reminders
Assess need for GRE/subject tests and course gaps

sections.title: Build research profile (Months 3-5)
sections.summary: Engage in research or projects and begin drafting a strong CV and statement.
bullets: Start or deepen research projects with clear documentation
Draft SOP and tailor your CV
Prepare writing/research samples

sections.title: Secure recommenders (Month 6)
sections.summary: Select and request strong letters well ahead of deadlines, providing materials to referees.
bullets: Choose recommenders who know your research
Provide CV, statement draft, and key accomplishments
Confirm submission timelines

sections.title: Polish and submit (Months 7-10)
sections.summary: Finish test prep, refine materials with feedback, then finalize and submit each application.
bullets: Follow a consistent revision process and tailor for programs
Pre-fill portals and verify uploads
Submit early when possible and save confirmations

sections.title: Interview and follow-up (Month 11)
sections.summary: Prepare research talks and conduct mock interviews; send prompt thank-you notes after contacts.
bullets: Practice concise research presentations
Prepare answers for technical and fit questions
Send personalized follow-ups to interviewers and faculty

sections.title: Decide and plan next steps (Month 12)
sections.summary: Evaluate offers based on fit and funding, and prepare contingencies if outcomes are unfavorable.
bullets: Compare advisor fit, funding, and career alignment
Negotiate or clarify funding when needed
Have a reapplication or gap-year research plan ready

user_facing.title: 1-Year Grad School Application Plan
user_facing.overview: A month-by-month checklist to organize preparation, applications, and follow-up so you stay on track from early planning to final decisions.

Prepare writing/research samples

bullets: Choose recommenders who know your research
Provide CV, statement draft, and key accomplishments
Confirm submission timelines

sections.title: Polish and submit (Months 7-10)
sections.summary: Finish test prep, refine materials with feedback, then finalize and submit each application.
bullets: Follow a consistent revision process and tailor for programs
Pre-fill portals and verify uploads
Submit early when possible and save confirmations

sections.title: Interview and follow-up (Month 11)
sections.summary: Prepare research talks and conduct mock interviews; send prompt thank-you notes after contacts.
bullets: Practice concise research presentations
Prepare answers for technical and fit questions
Send personalized follow-ups to interviewers and faculty

sections.summary: Evaluate offers based on fit and funding, and prepare contingencies if outcomes are unfavorable.

Negotiate or clarify funding when needed
Have a reapplication or gap-year research plan ready

domain.name: education
domain.description: Planning and checklists for academic goals such as graduate school applications.

task.name: one_year_grad_application_todo_list
task.title: 1-Year Graduate School Application To-Do List
task.description: Monthly breakdown of tasks and milestones for preparing and submitting graduate school applications over one year.

task_schema.name: todo_list
task_schema.description: A year-long todo list organized by month with actionable tasks.
task_schema.syntax_rules:
- Paths start with /TodoList
- Node types: TodoList, Month, Task
- Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]
- Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets

domain_schema.name: education_domain
domain_schema.description: Domain container for education tasks with versions
domain_schema.hierarchy:
Education_Root (root)
  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)
      `-- TaskVersion (version, indexed by @number)

Test prep & practice</name><Task><name>Intensive test prep (if needed)</name><due_date>Test date</due_date><description>Follow a study plan for GRE/subject tests; take practice exams weekly.</description><check_items><check_item>Schedule practice tests</check_item><check_item>Review weak topics</check_item></check_items><priority>medium</priority></Task><Task><name>Collect unofficial transcripts</name><due_date>End of month</due_date><description>Download transcripts to include with pre-applications or for recommenders.</description><check_items><check_item>Request official if required later</check_item></check_items><priority>low</priority></Task></Month><Month month_number="8"><name>Month 8 - Refine application materials</name><Task><name>Revise SOP and CV based on feedback</name><due_date>End of month</due_date><description>Incorporate advisor and peer feedback; tailor versions for specific programs.</description><check_items><check_item>Get feedback from 2 advisors</check_item><check_item>Create program-specific paragraphs</check_item></check_items><priority>high</priority></Task><Task><name>Prepare writing/research samples</name><due_date>Week 3</due_date><description>Select/format papers or project reports to submit or share with recommenders.</description><check_items><check_item>Polish one-page summary for each sample</check_item><check_item>Create PDF portfolio</check_item></check_items><priority>medium</priority></Task></Month><Month month_number="9"><name>Month 9 - Application logistics</name><Task><name>Create accounts and pre-fill forms</name><due_date>Week 2</due_date><description>Open application portals, upload documents and ensure recommenders have links.</description><check_items><check_item>Enter basic info in each portal</check_item><check_item>Upload CV and transcripts where allowed</check_item></check_items><priority>high</priority></Task><Task><name>Draft short answers and program-specific statements</name><due_date>Week 4</due_date><description>Prepare concise responses for program prompts and questions.</description><check_items><check_item>Save templates for reuse</check_item><check_item>Tailor to research groups</check_item></check_items><priority>high</priority></Task></Month><Month month_number="10"><name>Month 10 - Finalize and submit applications</name><Task><name>Complete final reviews</name><due_date>Two weeks before earliest deadline</due_date><description>Proofread, verify recommenders, double-check transcripts and fees.</description><check_items><check_item>Confirm recommenders submitted letters</check_item><check_item>Verify PDFs open and are labeled correctly</check_item></check_items><priority>high</priority></Task><Task><name>Submit applications</name><due_date>By each program deadline</due_date><description>Pay fees and submit; save confirmation emails and receipts.</description><check_items><check_item>Record submission dates</check_item><check_item>Save confirmation IDs</check_item></check_items><priority>high</priority></Task></Month><Month month_number="11"><name>Month 11 - Interviews & follow-up</name><Task><name>Prepare for interviews</name><due_date>As interview invites arrive</due_date><description>Practice research talks, common questions, and technical anchors.</description><check_items><check_item>Prepare 10-15 minute research summary</check_item><check_item>Mock interview with peers</check_item></check_items><priority>high</priority></Task><Task><name>Send thank-you/follow-up notes</name><due_date>Within 48 hours after contact</due_date><description>Send concise emails to interviewers and faculty contacts.</description><check_items><check_item>Personalize each message</check_item><check_item>Reiterate fit and next steps</check_item></check_items><priority>medium</priority></Task></Month><Month month_number="12"><name>Month 12 - Decisions & contingencies</name><Task><name>Compare offers and funding</name><due_date>Decision time</due_date><description>Evaluate advisor fit, funding, location, and long-term goals.</description><check_items><check_item>List pros/cons for each offer</check_item><check_item>Clarify funding and TA/RA expectations</check_item></check_items><priority>high</priority></Task><Task><name>Plan contingencies</name><due_date>After decisions</due_date><description>If no offers, plan reapplication or gap-year research options.</description><check_items><check_item>Identify positions or internships</check_item><check_item>Set timeline for reapplication</check_item></check_items><priority>medium</priority></Task></Month></TodoList></TodoList_Version></Root>

display.domain_schema:
name: education_domain
description: Domain container for education tasks with versions
hierarchy: "Education_Root (root)\n  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)\n    \
  \  `-- TaskVersion (version, indexed by @number)"
nodes:
  Education_Root:
    type: root
    fields: []
    children:
    - Task
  Task:
    type: container
    index_attr: name
    fields:
    - title
    - description
    - status
    children:
    - TaskVersion
  TaskVersion:
    type: version
    index_attr: number
    fields:
    - patch_info
    - conversation_history
    - created_at
    children: []
display.task_schema:
name: todo_list
description: A year-long todo list organized by month with actionable tasks.
hierarchy: "TodoList (root)\n    `-- Month (container, indexed by @month_number)\n\
  \        `-- Task (leaf)"
nodes:
  TodoList:
    type: root
    fields:
    - title
    - overview
    children:
    - Month
  Month:
    type: container
    fields:
    - name
    children:
    - Task
    index_attr: month_number
  Task:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - name
    - due_date
    - description
    - check_items
    - priority
    children: []
data_files:
  one_year_grad_application_todo_list: memory/education/one_year_grad_application_todo_list.xml
default_data: one_year_grad_application_todo_list
examples_file: prompts/query_generator/domains/xpath_examples_todo_list.txt
syntax_rules: '- Paths start with /TodoList

  - Node types: TodoList, Month, Task

  - Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]

  - Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets'
display.memory_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<Root>
  <TodoList_Version number="1">
    <patch_info>cold start initialization</patch_info>
    <conversation_history>I'm a cs undergrad at uoft and plan for grad school application recently. give me a 1 year todo list</conversation_history>
    <TodoList>
      <title>1-Year Grad School Application To-Do List</title>
      <overview>Monthly milestones and concrete tasks to prepare, apply, and follow up for graduate school applications over the next 12 months.</overview>
      <Month month_number="1">
        <name>Month 1 - Self-assessment & timeline</name>
        <Task>
          <name>Clarify goals and programs</name>
          <due_date>Week 1</due_date>
          <description>Decide target fields (CS subareas), degree type (MS/PhD), and 6-10 target programs.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>List research interests</check_item>
            <check_item>Identify preferred advisors</check_item>
            <check_item>Rank programs by fit and admission timeline</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>high</priority>
        </Task>
        <Task>
          <name>Create application calendar</name>
          <due_date>Week 2</due_date>
          <description>Map deadlines, test dates, and internal milestones over 12 months.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Add deadlines to calendar</check_item>
            <check_item>Set reminders 8 and 4 weeks before each deadline</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>high</priority>
        </Task>
      </Month>
      <Month month_number="2">
        <name>Month 2 - Tests & prerequisites</name>
        <Task>
          <name>Assess standardized tests</name>
          <due_date>Week 1</due_date>
          <description>Decide if GRE/subject tests are needed and plan prep.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Check program requirements</check_item>
            <check_item>Register for test if required</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>medium</priority>
        </Task>
        <Task>
          <name>Identify coursework gaps</name>
          <due_date>Week 3</due_date>
          <description>Find prerequisite classes or skills to strengthen candidacy.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>List missing courses</check_item>
            <check_item>Plan to take courses or online modules</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>medium</priority>
        </Task>
      </Month>
      <Month month_number="3">
        <name>Month 3 - Research & projects</name>
        <Task>
          <name>Engage in research / summer project planning</name>
          <due_date>End of month</due_date>
          <description>Start or ramp up research/projects to strengthen statement and letters.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Contact faculty for RA positions</check_item>
            <check_item>Outline project goals and timeline</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>high</priority>
        </Task>
        <Task>
          <name>Document results</name>
          <due_date>Ongoing</due_date>
          <description>Keep clear notes, code repo, and a short write-up for each project.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Push code to GitHub</check_item>
            <check_item>Prepare short README and results summary</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>high</priority>
        </Task>
      </Month>
      <Month month_number="4">
        <name>Month 4 - Networking & advisor outreach</name>
        <Task>
          <name>Build list of potential advisors</name>
          <due_date>Week 2</due_date>
          <description>Identify 10-20 faculty per program whose work aligns with yours.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Read recent papers</check_item>
            <check_item>Note specific projects to mention in emails</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>high</priority>
        </Task>
        <Task>
          <name>Start polite outreach</name>
          <due_date>Week 4</due_date>
          <description>Email faculty with concise interest and relevant work; request advice.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Customize 2-sentence pitch</check_item>
            <check_item>Attach CV and 1-page summary</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>medium</priority>
        </Task>
      </Month>
      <Month month_number="5">
        <name>Month 5 - Draft statements & CV</name>
        <Task>
          <name>Draft personal statement / SOP</name>
          <due_date>End of month</due_date>
          <description>Write an initial draft focusing on research experience, fit, and goals.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Outline story and paragraphs</check_item>
            <check_item>Write first full draft</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>high</priority>
        </Task>
        <Task>
          <name>Update academic CV</name>
          <due_date>Week 3</due_date>
          <description>Create a concise CV highlighting research, publications, and relevant coursework.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Add projects and roles</check_item>
            <check_item>Include links to code/papers</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>high</priority>
        </Task>
      </Month>
      <Month month_number="6">
        <name>Month 6 - Letters of recommendation planning</name>
        <Task>
          <name>Identify recommenders</name>
          <due_date>Week 1</due_date>
          <description>Choose 3-4 people familiar with your research and academic potential.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Prefer research supervisors and senior instructors</check_item>
            <check_item>Prepare summary packet for each</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>high</priority>
        </Task>
        <Task>
          <name>Request recommendations</name>
          <due_date>Week 3</due_date>
          <description>Ask recommenders early, provide deadlines and materials.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Send CV, statement draft, and key points</check_item>
            <check_item>Confirm willingness and expected submission date</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>high</priority>
        </Task>
      </Month>
      <Month month_number="7">
        <name>Month 7 - Test prep & practice</name>
        <Task>
          <name>Intensive test prep (if needed)</name>
          <due_date>Test date</due_date>
          <description>Follow a study plan for GRE/subject tests; take practice exams weekly.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Schedule practice tests</check_item>
            <check_item>Review weak topics</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>medium</priority>
        </Task>
        <Task>
          <name>Collect unofficial transcripts</name>
          <due_date>End of month</due_date>
          <description>Download transcripts to include with pre-applications or for recommenders.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Request official if required later</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>low</priority>
        </Task>
      </Month>
      <Month month_number="8">
        <name>Month 8 - Refine application materials</name>
        <Task>
          <name>Revise SOP and CV based on feedback</name>
          <due_date>End of month</due_date>
          <description>Incorporate advisor and peer feedback; tailor versions for specific programs.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Get feedback from 2 advisors</check_item>
            <check_item>Create program-specific paragraphs</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>high</priority>
        </Task>
        <Task>
          <name>Prepare writing/research samples</name>
          <due_date>Week 3</due_date>
          <description>Select/format papers or project reports to submit or share with recommenders.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Polish one-page summary for each sample</check_item>
            <check_item>Create PDF portfolio</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>medium</priority>
        </Task>
      </Month>
      <Month month_number="9">
        <name>Month 9 - Application logistics</name>
        <Task>
          <name>Create accounts and pre-fill forms</name>
          <due_date>Week 2</due_date>
          <description>Open application portals, upload documents and ensure recommenders have links.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Enter basic info in each portal</check_item>
            <check_item>Upload CV and transcripts where allowed</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>high</priority>
        </Task>
        <Task>
          <name>Draft short answers and program-specific statements</name>
          <due_date>Week 4</due_date>
          <description>Prepare concise responses for program prompts and questions.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Save templates for reuse</check_item>
            <check_item>Tailor to research groups</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>high</priority>
        </Task>
      </Month>
      <Month month_number="10">
        <name>Month 10 - Finalize and submit applications</name>
        <Task>
          <name>Complete final reviews</name>
          <due_date>Two weeks before earliest deadline</due_date>
          <description>Proofread, verify recommenders, double-check transcripts and fees.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Confirm recommenders submitted letters</check_item>
            <check_item>Verify PDFs open and are labeled correctly</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>high</priority>
        </Task>
        <Task>
          <name>Submit applications</name>
          <due_date>By each program deadline</due_date>
          <description>Pay fees and submit; save confirmation emails and receipts.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Record submission dates</check_item>
            <check_item>Save confirmation IDs</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>high</priority>
        </Task>
      </Month>
      <Month month_number="11">
        <name>Month 11 - Interviews & follow-up</name>
        <Task>
          <name>Prepare for interviews</name>
          <due_date>As interview invites arrive</due_date>
          <description>Practice research talks, common questions, and technical anchors.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Prepare 10-15 minute research summary</check_item>
            <check_item>Mock interview with peers</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>high</priority>
        </Task>
        <Task>
          <name>Send thank-you/follow-up notes</name>
          <due_date>Within 48 hours after contact</due_date>
          <description>Send concise emails to interviewers and faculty contacts.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Personalize each message</check_item>
            <check_item>Reiterate fit and next steps</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>medium</priority>
        </Task>
      </Month>
      <Month month_number="12">
        <name>Month 12 - Decisions & contingencies</name>
        <Task>
          <name>Compare offers and funding</name>
          <due_date>Decision time</due_date>
          <description>Evaluate advisor fit, funding, location, and long-term goals.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>List pros/cons for each offer</check_item>
            <check_item>Clarify funding and TA/RA expectations</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>high</priority>
        </Task>
        <Task>
          <name>Plan contingencies</name>
          <due_date>After decisions</due_date>
          <description>If no offers, plan reapplication or gap-year research options.</description>
          <check_items>
            <check_item>Identify positions or internships</check_item>
            <check_item>Set timeline for reapplication</check_item>
          </check_items>
          <priority>medium</priority>
        </Task>
      </Month>
    </TodoList>
  </TodoList_Version>
</Root>
